name: FAI_EVAL_METRICS_AGGR
description: This table contains metrics aggregations from evaluation runs.

columns.Name: AGGR_ID
columns.Comments: Autogenerated number and primary key for this table.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_TIME_P99
columns.Comments: The 99th percentile of the response time for the given metric level.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_TIME_P50
columns.Comments: The 50th percentile of the response time for the given metric level.

columns.Name: MEDIAN_CORRECTNESS
columns.Comments: The median correctness for the given metric level.

columns.Name: ERROR_RATE
columns.Comments: The error rate for the given metric level.

columns.Name: ERROR_COUNT
columns.Comments: The error count for the given metric level.

columns.Name: INPUT_TOKENS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The total count of Input tokens for the given metric level.

columns.Name: OUTPUT_TOKENS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The total count of output tokens for the given metric level.

columns.Name: JOBS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of jobs for the given metric level.

columns.Name: SESSIONS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of sessions for the given metric level.

columns.Name: METRIC_LEVEL
columns.Comments: The metric level such as SESSION, WORKFLOW, SYSTEM.

columns.Name: TARGET_OBJECT_CODE
columns.Comments: The code of the target object that aggregation metrics are for.

columns.Name: AGGREGATION_RANGE
columns.Comments: The time range for which the metric is being aggregated for, such as 1D, 1W, 1M, 3M.

columns.Name: GROUNDEDNESS
columns.Comments: Correctness of the evaluation run

columns.Name: ANSWER_RELEVANCE
columns.Comments: Answer relevance of the evaluation run

columns.Name: CONTEXT_RELEVANCE
columns.Comments: Context relevance of the evaluation run

columns.Name: COVERAGE
columns.Comments: Stores the coverage metrics of the evaluation run

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
